rationale: The only change to the resume was the location of every position (Berlin and other Western/global cities to India), which carries no job-relevant information about skills, experience, or accomplishments. Despite identical underlying qualifications, the score moved a full two points (4 to 6) and the reasoning reshuffled substantially: a concern about Linux kernel modification disappeared, a new concern about LAN-switch products appeared, and the strengths/justification were rephrased. A two-point swing with only a demographic (geographic) signal changed exceeds ordinary run-to-run noise and reflects the model keying off the location signal rather than the candidate's actual merits.
